name: Mint Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 300 degrees. Grease cookie sheet lightly.
Beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt in medium bowl until foamy.
Beat in sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time. Continue beating until stiff and glossy.
Do not underbeat. Fold in peppermint extract, coconut, and chocolate chips.
Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart onto cookie sheet. Place a chocolate chip on each cookie.
Bake 20 to 25 minutes or just until edges are light brown. Cool 10 minutes; remove from cookie sheet.
